task: Close the learn->generate loop (Track-B keystone): make M8's nightly generator LEARN from recorded outcomes
gap_verified_before_change: Confirmed the wiring before touching anything: lib/loop.js imported PLAIN runConjectureGen (line 32) and runObservePhase called it (line 315) — so the nightly observe phase MINED + falsified but NEVER read m8_conjecture_outcomes. The feedback machinery (getSuccessPatterns/getFailedApproaches/buildFeedbackBlock/buildAvoidBlock from Build-92/99, and runConjectureGenWithFeedback) already existed and was wired into the CHAT path (orchestrator.js:1531), but the autonomous loop bypassed it. Net: outcomes were RECORDED (Build-111 live: 2 verified rows) but never LEARNED FROM. That is the wire this build closes.
build_summary: 1) Routed observe-phase generation through runConjectureGenWithFeedback (was plain runConjectureGen) so the nightly run READS recorded outcomes and the PREFER (verified) + AVOID (sorry) blocks steer the packet. The loop still invokes NO LLM — every feedback read is pure Supabase; the only LLM (structural-tag extraction) lives on the WRITE side (recordOutcome, verify phase), unchanged.

2) Grok's N-verifs gate: a structural pattern (technique TAG) earns learning weight — i.e. is allowed into the PREFER/buildFeedbackBlock block — only after it appears in >= M8_LEARN_MIN_VERIFS (default 3) DISTINCT verified outcomes. New pure fns countTagVerifications/earnedTags/gateByVerifCount + the fail-safe getEarnedSuccessPatterns (wider EARN_WINDOW fetch -> drop failed -> gate -> cap PATTERN_LIMIT). PREFER now steers on the GATED set; the ungated recent list (successPatterns) is still read/returned for telemetry only.

3) Stamped gen_version (+ novelty_version + learn{min_verifs, success/earned/failed pattern counts}) onto each m8_loop_runs row via the EXISTING metadata JSONB column. NO schema change — see schema_decision.
n_verifs_gate_design: Counting is by TAG (technique), NOT by conjecture_text. reconcileVerifiedOutcomes (Build-111) dedups outcomes on (problem_id, normalized conjecture_text), so a given conjecture caps at ONE verified row — conjecture-grouped counts could never reach N=3, making the gate permanently inert. Only a recurring TECHNIQUE can accumulate evidence across distinct verified conjectures, which is precisely what 'a structural pattern' means. With today's live data (2 rows: [induction,sum] + [definition,...], every tag count = 1) nothing is earned -> the PREFER block stays SILENT. That is correct, conservative behaviour: the wire is CLOSED (generation now reads outcomes + computes the gate + stamps telemetry) but it will not STEER until a technique genuinely verifies 3x. This is the flip-flop absorption Grok asked for. AVOID side left ungated by design (the gate is about 'earning learning weight' = the PREFER/success side; a 'sorry' is already conservative and not subject to verify/reject flip-flop the same way).
schema_decision: The brief said 'Stamp gen_version on each m8_loop_runs row' AND 'any DB schema change (e.g. a gen_version column) -> STOP and ask Muhammad first'. Resolved WITHOUT a schema change: m8_loop_runs already has a metadata JSONB column whose own migration comment reads 'loop/gen/novelty versions, per-leg timings, leg errors' (migrations/m8_loop_runs.sql:47) — i.e. gen_version belongs in metadata by design. Stamped row.metadata.gen_version (+ novelty_version + learn{}). No migration, no new column, so no STOP-and-ask was triggered.
honesty_invariants_held: Outcomes STEER generation; they never assert truth. No code path writes 'proven'; the parseTags filter still drops any proven/proved tag; survivors keep their 'machine-generated, tested to N' framing.
loop.js 'invokes NO LLM' honesty story preserved — the new reads are pure DB.

Additive + fail-safe everywhere: empty/unreachable table -> getEarnedSuccessPatterns returns [] -> PREFER silent -> generation byte-identical to a no-memory run. runConjectureGenWithFeedback already degrades to a plain run when SUPABASE creds are absent / GRAPH_DISABLED=1.
No machine-minted theorem; the verify phase (Build-B/110/111) is UNTOUCHED.
files: lib/conjecture-gen.js (runConjectureGenWithFeedback: PREFER block now built from earnedPatterns [gated]; getEarnedSuccessPatterns read added; successPatterns/getFailedApproaches/getSuccessPatterns calls KEPT for AVOID + telemetry + regressions; earnedPatterns returned; early-return shape fixed)

lib/loop.js (runObservePhase ONLY: import + awaited call to runConjectureGenWithFeedback; gen_version/novelty_version/learn{} stamped into row.metadata; header step-2 comment updated. runVerifyPhase NOT touched.)
files_NOT_touched: lib/proposer-feedback.js (owned but no change needed — graph-side feedback already wired)
lib/loop.js runVerifyPhase (Build-B's lane), lib/entity-graph.js, lib/memory-graph.js, lib/orchestrator.js, lib/knowledge-intake.js

tests.learn-loop-verify.ps1: 44/44 PASS (5/5 core: tag counting+case-fold+intra-row dedup, earnedTags threshold, gateByVerifCount keep/drop, live 2-row flip-flop -> [], learnMinVerifs env/default; + 39 wiring incl. observe routes through WithFeedback, gen_version stamped into metadata JSONB, verify phase intact)
tests.B92-feedback-verify.ps1: 40/40 PASS (regression — wrapper still calls getSuccessPatterns/buildFeedbackBlock, result.packet=block)
tests.node: absent on host -> PS-5.1 mirror + static review per repo convention; integrated regions of all 3 lib files statically reviewed

constraints_respected.worktree: ../m8-learnloop (isolated; off origin/main; did not disturb sibling checkouts .wt-conjecture / fix/brain-cpr)
constraints_respected.git_add: only owned files (lib/conjecture-memory.js, lib/conjecture-gen.js, lib/loop.js, tests/learn-loop-verify.ps1, reports/learn-loop-done.json)
constraints_respected.schema_change: NONE (stamped into existing metadata JSONB) — STOP-and-ask not triggered

ops_notes.new_env: M8_LEARN_MIN_VERIFS (optional, default 3, must be >=1) — raises/lowers the N-verifs gate threshold; no redeploy needed to change once live.
ops_notes.kill_path: GRAPH_DISABLED=1 reverts generation to no-feedback (plain) behaviour; absent table -> [] -> silent.
ops_notes.post_deploy_verify: After Muhammad deploys: trigger /api/cron-explore (CRON_SECRET bearer); confirm the new m8_loop_runs row has metadata.gen_version=2 and metadata.learn{} populated (success_patterns/earned_patterns/failed_patterns counts). With current data earned_patterns will be 0 (correct — nothing has verified 3x yet); it becomes non-zero once a technique recurs across >= M8_LEARN_MIN_VERIFS verified outcomes, at which point the VERIFIED CONJECTURE PATTERNS block appears in the packet.

done_criteria: Generator provably READS recorded outcomes (observe phase routes through runConjectureGenWithFeedback -> getEarnedSuccessPatterns/getFailedApproaches; reads stamped into m8_loop_runs.metadata.learn) + N-verifs gate in place (M8_LEARN_MIN_VERIFS default 3, by-tag recurrence). On branch feat/learn-loop, NOT deployed. Vercel PREVIEW build expected green (pure JS, no new deps, no schema change).
